sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, arr Array(Int32), str String);
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) AS is_non_empty FROM test_arrays WHERE notEmpty(arr) = 1;
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) AS is_non_empty FROM test_arrays WHERE arr = [1, 2] OR notEmpty(arr) = 0;
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) AS is_non_empty FROM test_arrays WHERE notEmpty(arr) = IF(str = 'test2', 0, 1);
WITH (SELECT count(*) FROM test_arrays GROUP BY notEmpty(arr) HAVING notEmpty(arr) = 1) AS cnt_non_empty SELECT * FROM cnt_non_empty;
SELECT id, str FROM test_arrays WHERE str NOT NULL AND notEmpty(arr) = 1 ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) AS is_non_empty, arr FROM test_arrays WHERE notEmpty(arr) = (SELECT notEmpty(arr) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2);
WITH (SELECT arr FROM test_arrays) AS array_values SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE notEmpty(array_values) = 1 GROUP BY id HAVING is_non_empty = 1;
CREATE TABLE secondary (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT t.id, notEmpty(t.arr) FROM test_arrays t JOIN secondary s ON s.id = t.id WHERE notEmpty(t.arr) AND str = s.value;
SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE arr = CASE WHEN str = 'test1' THEN [1, 2] ELSE [] END;
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) FROM test_arrays WHERE notEmpty(CASE WHEN str IS NULL THEN [3] ELSE arr END) = 1;
